command_eng: Announce the outdoor fine dust level using the speaker.

args.Text: The outdoor fine dust level is $Pm25Weather

joi_block.name: Scenario
joi_block.script:
pm25 = (#WeatherProvider).weatherProvider_pm25Weather
(#Speaker).speaker_speak("The outdoor fine dust level is " + pm25)

code:
{
  "name": "Scenario",
  "cron": "",
  "period": 0,
  "script": "pm25 = (#WeatherProvider).weatherProvider_pm25Weather
(#Speaker).speaker_speak(\"The outdoor fine dust level is \" + pm25)"
}
